question_tagalog: Paano kung bigla tayong tumama sa lotto bukas, ano bibilhin mo muna?
question_english: What if we suddenly win the lottery tomorrow, what will you buy first?
quote_tagalog: Masarap mangarap, lalo na pag kasama ka.
quote_english: It's nice to dream, especially with you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung naging hayop ako, anong hayop ako at bakit?
question_english: What if I became an animal, what animal would I be and why?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong porma mo, ikaw pa rin yan.
quote_english: Whatever form you take, it's still you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung may zombie apocalypse, sino sainyo ang mas survivable?
question_english: What if there's a zombie apocalypse, who between us is more survivable?
quote_tagalog: Magkasama tayong lalaban hanggang dulo.
quote_english: We will fight together until the end.

question_tagalog: Paano kung na-trap tayo sa isang islang walang tao, anong 3 bagay ang dadalhin mo?
question_english: What if we got trapped on an uninhabited island, what 3 things would you bring?
quote_tagalog: Basta't kasama ka, kahit saan man tayo mapadpad.
quote_english: As long as you're with me, wherever we end up.

question_tagalog: Paano kung pwede nating basahin ang isip ng isa't isa for one day?
question_english: What if we could read each other's minds for one day?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang maitatago pa ang puso ko.
quote_english: My heart has nothing left to hide.

question_tagalog: Paano kung maging sikat tayong artista bigla, anong klaseng movie ang bida tayo?
question_english: What if we suddenly become famous actors, what kind of movie would we star in?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang bida sa sarili nating kwento.
quote_english: We are the stars of our own story.

question_tagalog: Paano kung naging lalaki/babae ka for 24 hours (switched gender)? Anong gagawin mo?
question_english: What if you became a guy/girl for 24 hours (switched gender)? What would you do?
quote_tagalog: Minsan masaya ring ilagay ang sarili sa sapatos ng iba.
quote_english: Sometimes it's fun to put yourself in someone else's shoes.

question_tagalog: Paano kung burahin ang memorya ko at di kita kilala, paano mo ko liligawan ulit?
question_english: What if my memory was erased and I didn't know you, how would you court me again?
quote_tagalog: Ipaparamdam kong muli ang unang pag-ibig.
quote_english: I will make you feel first love all over again.

question_tagalog: Paano kung inoferan ka ng malaking pera para iwan ako, magkano ang price mo?
question_english: What if you were offered huge money to leave me, what is your price?
quote_tagalog: Hindi matutumbasan ng pera ang halaga mo.
quote_english: Money cannot equal your worth.

question_tagalog: Paano kung pwede tayong bumalik sa past for 1 hour, saang specific memory tayo pupunta?
question_english: What if we could go back to the past for 1 hour, which specific memory would we go to?
quote_tagalog: Ang nakaraan ang nagpatibay sa atin ngayon.
quote_english: The past made us stronger today.

question_tagalog: Paano kung pwede mo kong palitan ng isang fictional character, sino?
question_english: What if you could replace me with a fictional character, who?
quote_tagalog: Kahit sino sila, ikaw lang ang totoo.
quote_english: No matter who they are, only you are real.

question_tagalog: Paano kung isa satin kailangang mag-migrate sa malayo, LDR ba or sasama yung isa?
question_english: What if one of us had to migrate far, LDR or the other comes along?
quote_tagalog: Lahat gagawin, huwag lang tayong magkahiwalay.
quote_english: Will do everything, just so we won't part.

question_tagalog: Paano kung pwede nating makita yung future natin 10 years from now?
question_english: What if we could see our future 10 years from now?
quote_tagalog: Basta magkasama tayo, fulfilling ang bukas.
quote_english: As long as we're together, tomorrow is fulfilling.

question_tagalog: Paano kung maging invisible ka for a day, anong kalokohan gagawin mo sakin?
question_english: What if you became invisible for a day, what prank would you do to me?
quote_tagalog: Kalokohan man at biruan, tayo pa rin.
quote_english: Jokes and pranks aside, it's still us.

question_tagalog: Paano kung hindi tayo nagkakilala dun sa lugar/time na nagmeet tayo?
question_english: What if we didn't meet at that place/time we actually met?
quote_tagalog: Hahanapin at hahanapin pa rin kita.
quote_english: I will still search and find you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung allowed tayong mag-swap ng trabaho for a week, sinong mas mahihirapan?
question_english: What if we're allowed to swap jobs for a week, who would have a harder time?
quote_tagalog: Ang bigat mo ay bigat ko rin.
quote_english: Your burden is my burden too.

question_tagalog: Paano kung may mapili satin para pumunta sa space (Mars), papayag ka ba?
question_english: What if one of us gets chosen to go to space (Mars), would you agree?
quote_tagalog: Hanggang outer space, pag-ibig ko'y sayo.
quote_english: Even to outer space, my love is yours.

question_tagalog: Paano kung pwede tayong pumili ng superpower na magkapartner tayo, ano yun?
question_english: What if we could pick a superpower as a partnered duo, what would it be?
quote_tagalog: Ang tunay kong kapangyarihan ay ang mapasaya ka.
quote_english: My true power is making you happy.

question_tagalog: Paano kung nagka-amnesia ako pero ako yung unti-unting lumalapit sayo?
question_english: What if I got amnesia but I'm the one slowly approaching you?
quote_tagalog: Muling mag-iibigan sa ikalawang pagkakataon.
quote_english: Falling in love again for the second time.

question_tagalog: Paano kung bawal na tayong mag-usap gamit salita for a month, paano tayo mag-uusap?
question_english: What if we're forbidden to use words for a month, how would we communicate?
quote_tagalog: Titig pa lang, gets na natin ang isa't isa.
quote_english: Just a look, we already understand each other.

question_tagalog: Paano kung na-stuck tayo sa elevator ng 5 hours, anong gagawin natin?
question_english: What if we got stuck in an elevator for 5 hours, what would we do?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong sitwasyon, basta ikaw katabi.
Any situation, as long as you're beside me.

question_tagalog: Paano kung naging bida tayo ng isang horror movie, sino ang unang mamamatay?
question_english: What if we starred in a horror movie, who would die first?
quote_tagalog: Sabay nating isisigaw ang takot at tawa.
quote_english: We will scream out fear and laughter together.

question_tagalog: Paano kung pwede mo baguhin ang pangalan ko, ano ipapangalan mo sakin?
question_english: What if you could change my name, what would you name me?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong tawag ko, ang ibig sabihin ay 'mahal'.
quote_english: Whatever I call you, it means 'love'.

question_tagalog: Paano kung pwede tayong mabuhay sa ibang decade (e.g., 90s, 60s), anong era at bakit?
question_english: What if we could live in a different decade (e.g., 90s, 60s), what era and why?
quote_tagalog: Pag-ibig natin ay walang pinipiling panahon.
quote_english: Our love knows no era.

question_tagalog: Paano kung required tayong mag-suot ng matching clothes everyday for a year?
question_english: What if we were required to wear matching clothes everyday for a year?
quote_tagalog: Matching man o hindi, magkapares parin puso natin.
quote_english: Matching or not, our hearts are still a pair.

question_tagalog: Paano kung bigla tayong naging bata ulit (5-year-olds) with our current mind?
question_english: What if we suddenly became kids again (5-year-olds) with our current mind?
quote_tagalog: Aalagaan pa rin kita hanggang sa paglaki.
quote_english: I will still care for you until we grow up.

question_tagalog: Paano kung nalaman mong spy ako at mission kitang bantayan all along?
question_english: What if you found out I'm a spy and my mission was to watch you all along?
quote_tagalog: Nahuli mo na ang puso ko kaya okay lang.
quote_english: You already caught my heart so it's fine.

question_tagalog: Paano kung isa satin hindi pala makakatulog unless yakap yung isa?
question_english: What if one of us couldn't sleep unless hugging the other?
quote_tagalog: Gabi-gabi kitang yayakapin nang mahigpit.
quote_english: I'll hug you tight every single night.

question_tagalog: Paano kung the only way to save the world is maghiwalay tayo para sa mission natin?
question_english: What if the only way to save the world is for us to break up for our mission?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang aking sariling mundo.
quote_english: You are my own world.

question_tagalog: Paano kung naging bilyonaryo tayo, anong klaseng bahay ang bibilhin natin?
question_english: What if we became billionaires, what kind of house would we buy?
quote_tagalog: Kahit palasyo o barong-barong, basta tayong dalawa.
quote_english: Mansion or shack, as long as it's the two of us.

question_tagalog: Paano kung may time machine ka kaso one-way lang, saan/kailan ka pupunta?
question_english: What if you had a time machine but it's one-way only, where/when would you go?
quote_tagalog: Ating lalakbayin ang kinabukasan.
quote_english: We will travel to the future.

question_tagalog: Paano kung sumali tayo sa Amazing Race, mag-aaway ba tayo sa tasks?
question_english: What if we joined the Amazing Race, would we fight over tasks?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang best team sa lahat.
quote_english: We are the best team of all.

question_tagalog: Paano kung 1 linggo lang tayong magkasama before the world ends?
question_english: What if we only have 1 week together before the world ends?
quote_tagalog: Sulitin ang bawat natitirang sandali sayo.
quote_english: Make the most of every remaining moment with you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung kailangan natin magbukas ng business together, anong negosyo?
question_english: What if we had to open a business together, what business?
quote_tagalog: Business partners at life partners.
quote_english: Business partners and life partners.

question_tagalog: Paano kung may clone tayo pero magkaiba personality sa atin, friends ba tayo sa kanila?
question_english: What if we both have clones with opposite personalities, would we be friends with them?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang tutulad sa original na ikaw.
quote_english: No one can replace the original you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung mapunta tayo sa katawan ng isa't isa for 1 day, anong una mong gagawin?
question_english: What if we switch bodies for 1 day, what's the first thing you'll do?
quote_tagalog: Ramdam ko ang pagod at sigla mo araw-araw.
quote_english: I feel your exhaustion and vibe every day.

question_tagalog: Paano kung may nag-alok satin ng free world tour bukas na agad, Game ba?
question_english: What if someone offered us a free world tour leaving tomorrow, are you game?
quote_tagalog: Kahit buong mundo ang ikutin natin.
quote_english: Even if we travel the whole world.

question_tagalog: Paano kung allowed lang tayong makinig sa isang kanta forever, anong kanta natin?
question_english: What if we're only allowed to listen to one song forever, what is our song?
quote_tagalog: Ang himig ng pag-ibig nating wagas.
quote_english: The melody of our endless love.

question_tagalog: Paano kung na-stranded tayo sa bundok with no signal, pano tayo mag-susurvive?
question_english: What if we got stranded on a mountain with no signal, how do we survive?
quote_tagalog: Tayo'y magpakatatag, para makauwi nang ligtas.
quote_english: Let's be strong, to go home safe.

question_tagalog: Paano kung may alien invasion, makikipag-friends ka ba sakanila or away?
question_english: What if there's an alien invasion, would you befriend them or fight them?
quote_tagalog: Ipagtatanggol kita laban sa buong uniberso.
quote_english: I'll protect you against the whole universe.

question_tagalog: Paano kung required tayong pumunta sa deserted mall ng midnight as a dare?
question_english: What if we were required to go to a deserted mall at midnight as a dare?
quote_tagalog: Kahit nakakatakot basta hawak ko ang kamay mo.
quote_english: Even if scary as long as I hold your hand.

question_tagalog: Paano kung bigla naging aso at pusa tayo, sino satin yung aso?
question_english: What if we suddenly became a dog and a cat, who between us is the dog?
quote_tagalog: Kahit aso't pusa, magkasundo pa rin tayo.
quote_english: Even if like dog and cat, we still get along.

question_tagalog: Paano kung meron kang ability to pause time, pero 5 minutes lang a day?
question_english: What if you had the ability to pause time, but only 5 minutes a day?
quote_tagalog: Hihintuin ang oras para masilayan ka.
quote_english: Will stop time just to gaze at you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung may parallel universe, and mag-kaaway tayo dun, ganon parin kaya feels natin deep down?
question_english: What if there's a parallel universe where we are enemies, would our feelings deep down be the same?
quote_tagalog: Pag-ibig ang mananaig sa kahit anong dimensyon.
quote_english: Love will prevail in any dimension.

question_tagalog: Paano kung nalaman mong ako pala yung secret admirer mo nung grade school pa tayo?
question_english: What if you found out I was your secret admirer since we were in grade school?
quote_tagalog: Bata pa lang sana inangkin na kita.
quote_english: Should've claimed you even when we were young.

question_tagalog: Paano kung isa satin biglang nakapag-imbento ng bago at yumaman tayo sobra, anong bibilhin?
question_english: What if one of us invented something new and we got super rich, what will we buy?
quote_tagalog: Ginhawang buhay na para sa pamilya natin.
quote_english: A comfortable life ready for our family.

question_tagalog: Paano kung naging character tayo sa Harry Potter universe, saang bahay (house) tayo mapupunta?
question_english: What if we became characters in the Harry Potter universe, which house would we be in?
quote_tagalog: Pareho tayong nababagay sa magagandang kwento.
quote_english: We both belong in beautiful stories.

question_tagalog: Paano kung kinailangan mong magtago dahil hinahanap ka tapos ako lang kasabwat mo?
question_english: What if you have to hide because you are being chased and I am your only accomplice?
quote_tagalog: Itatago kita sa mga yakap ko.
quote_english: I will hide you in my hugs.

question_tagalog: Paano kung isulat mo life story natin as a book, ano yung title niya?
question_english: What if you wrote our life story as a book, what would the title be?
quote_tagalog: Pinakamagandang kabanata ay ang kasama ka.
quote_english: The most beautiful chapter is being with you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung sa panaginip lang pala tayo naging magkasintahan at ngayon lang nagising?
question_english: What if we were only lovers in a dream and you just woke up?
quote_tagalog: Gagawin kong totoo ang matamis na panaginip.
quote_english: I will make the sweet dream come true.

question_tagalog: Paano kung pwede tayong ma-teleport kahit saan basta exactly 1 minute lang, saan tayo?
question_english: What if we could teleport anywhere as long as it's exactly 1 minute, where would we go?
quote_tagalog: Sulit ang isang minuto basta magkatabi.
quote_english: One minute is worth it if side by side.

question_tagalog: Paano kung isa satin suddenly became a ghost, magpaparamdam ka ba sakin always?
question_english: What if one of us suddenly became a ghost, would you haunt me always?
quote_tagalog: Hanggang kabilang buhay hindi kita iiwan.
quote_english: Until the afterlife I won't leave you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung allowed tayong basahin ang diary ng isa't isa, tutol kaba?
question_english: What if we were allowed to read each other's diaries, would you object?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng sikreto ay bukas na aklat.
quote_english: All secrets are an open book.

question_tagalog: Paano kung mapupunta tayo sa loob ng paborito mo game/video game for a week?
question_english: What if we teleport inside your favorite video game for a week?
quote_tagalog: Lalaruin ang buhay ka-partner ang tunay mong player.
quote_english: Playing life partnered with your real player.

question_tagalog: Paano kung may truth serum akong ipapainom sayo, may isang bagay kabang matatakot aminin?
question_english: What if I poured truth serum in your drink, is there one thing you'd be scared to admit?
quote_tagalog: Tiwala ang tanging foundation natin sa isa't isa.
quote_english: Trust is our only foundation to each other.

question_tagalog: Paano kung sa isang alternate universe we never got into a romantic relationship?
question_english: What if in an alternate universe we never got into a romantic relationship?
quote_tagalog: Sisiguraduhin kong magkikita parin tayo dyan.
quote_english: I will make sure we'll still meet there.

question_tagalog: Paano kung bigla na lang tayo hindi na tumanda physically, forever 25 naba tayo?
question_english: What if we suddenly stopped aging physically, are we forever 25?
quote_tagalog: Laging young at heart at in-love para sayo.
quote_english: Always young at heart and in-love for you.

question_tagalog: Paano kung isa nalang satin ang pwedeng mabuhay and ang decision ay nasa iyo?
question_english: What if only one of us could live and the decision was up to you?
quote_tagalog: Mabuhay ka sana para sakin at pasayahin ibang tao.
quote_english: Please live for me and make other people happy.

question_tagalog: Paano kung every time you hug me, may random good karma that happens to us?
question_english: What if every time you hug me, some random good karma happens to us?
quote_tagalog: Swerte kita kaya payakap naman idol.
quote_english: You're my lucky charm so give me a hug idol.

question_tagalog: Paano kung required to restart our relationship without our past memories, mahuhulog ba tayo ulit?
question_english: What if we were required to restart our relationship without our past memories, would we still fall in love?
quote_tagalog: Masarap ma-inlove sayo nang paulit-ulit lang.
quote_english: It feels good to fall in love with you again and again.
